name: call-calendar
description: Call Calendar - Web application for scheduling and managing calls

scripts.docker:prod:clean: docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down -v && docker system prune -f
scripts.test:all: npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
scripts.build:db: cd packages/db && npm install && npm run db:generate && npm run build
scripts.build:api: cd apps/api && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:db && npm run build:api
